name: Project List API
summary: Backend API endpoint for listing, searching, and paginating projects
goals: Provide RESTful endpoints for project listing with filtering and pagination
Return project metadata including name, path, status, and timestamps

specDetail.description: Exposes GET /api/projects endpoint that returns a paginated list of projects. Supports query-based filtering by name and sorting by various fields.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Number of items per page (default 20, max 100)

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search term to filter projects by name

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Field to sort by (name, lastModified, createdAt)

constraints: Must return results within 200ms for up to 1000 projects
Must validate and sanitize all query parameters
Pagination must include total count for UI rendering

acceptanceCriteria.then: all projects are returned in paginated format with metadata

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: docs(sync-specs): implement leaf determination redesign with frontend/backend criteria
